Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- SALINA RUBIN DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATIONS- Hearing On Claim Of Exemption, Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment Debtor. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
SAKUBA RUBIN, 925-497-9068, DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY APPEARING IN PRO PER

INC AS TO DEFENDANT SAKUBA RUBIN'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ISS OFF CALENDAR, TO BE RENOTICED IN DISCOVERY PURSUANT TO CRC 10(A)(3). (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J.
